label: Swamp
comfortReason: Waterlogged ground, biting insects, and poor visibility. Not a gentle place to rest.
scoutGuidance: Survival check. Poor: 2-8 | Average: 9-13 | Good: 14+. Ranger or druid has advantage. Heavy armor has disadvantage.

nat1: A raised hummock, dry and stable. Good sightlines over the water.
A cluster of old willows with dry ground underneath.
A fishing platform, abandoned but solid.
poor: Wet ground everywhere. Nothing is truly dry.
A muddy bank. The insects are relentless.
Ankle-deep water. This is the best you found.
average: A raised root platform keeps you above the waterline.
A fallen tree bridges two dry patches.
good: A concealed island in the marsh. Only one approach.
A hunter's blind, elevated and hidden.
A dry cave behind hanging moss.
nat20: An ancient stone platform, hidden by mist.
A druid's grove, warded and dry.
A hollow cypress trunk, spacious and concealed.
